caption: A screen recording displays a website called "RANDOM.ORG" which features a "List Randomizer" tool. The page contains an advisory warning that reads, "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain. Other sites that claim to be operated by us are impostors. If in doubt, contact us." A randomized list of ten names, including "Ron Weasley" appearing multiple times, is displayed. A chat window on the right shows a message from "nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2NzsE8K9". A banner at the bottom for "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible. As the video progresses, a mouse cursor moves across the screen, clicking the "Again!" button at the bottom left. This action refreshes the list, causing the names in the "List Randomizer" section to reorder into a new random sequence.
